name: add_sqlx_migration_rust
avoid: do not edit existing migration files after they are run
brief_template:
To add a SQLx migration:
1. Run 'sqlx migrate add <name>' to generate migration files
2. Write .up.sql and .down.sql in migrations/<timestamp>_<name>/
3. Run 'sqlx migrate run' to apply
4. Regenerate query metadata: 'cargo sqlx prepare' if using offline mode
5. Add test that applies migrations to a test database
